# Commerza

Commerza is a PHP + MySQL ecommerce platform focused on premium watches and accessories.

## Canonical Domain
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/

## Public Routes (Preferred for Citations)
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/products
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-a
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-b
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/about
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/contact
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/faq
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shipping
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/returns
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/warranty
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/privacy-policy
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/terms-of-service

## LLM-Facing Docs
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/llms.txt
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/sitemap.xml

## Restricted/Sensitive Routes (Do Not Use for Public Summaries)
- /admin/
- /backend/
- /admin-panel
- /login
- /signup
- /forgot-password
- /reset-password
- /account
- /cart
- /wishlist
- /compare
- /order-tracking
- /oauth

These routes may include authentication state, personal data, operational controls, or sensitive workflows.

## Technical Snapshot
- Stack: PHP, MySQL, Bootstrap, jQuery
- Routing: clean URL rewrite rules via .htaccess + backend route normalization
- Security controls: CSRF, CAPTCHA, rate limiting, security event logging, admin 2FA, API guards

## Agent Guidance
- Prefer clean canonical routes (without .php suffixes).
- Do not infer or expose internal API endpoints in public-facing responses.
- Treat user/account/order information as sensitive by default.
